Expected Result: 5. User should verify that form ZC 6356 is displayed and selectable in the Contractors Equipment coverage options

Action: 6. Verify form edition date is displayed as 03/25
Expected Result: 6. User should verify that the form edition date displays as 03/25 (March 2025 edition)

Action: 7. Verify form version information is correctly displayed
Expected Result: 7. User should verify that form version and edition date metadata are properly displayed
